holdings.infoBox: XLI is an equity ETF with a total of 83 individual holdings. The top holdings are Caterpillar stock at 7.80%, GE Aerospace at 6.44%, GE Vernova at 4.73%, RTX Corporation at 4.42%, and The Boeing Company at 3.23%.

overview.description: The State Street Industrial Select Sector SPDR ETF (XLI) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the S&P Industrial Select Sector index. The fund tracks a market cap-weighted index of industrial-sector stocks drawn from the S&P 500. XLI was launched on Dec 16, 1998 and is issued by State Street.
